data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of net terms (Net-15/30/45) and due-date tracking. However, the evidence does not explicitly confirm that these terms are being tracked or managed within the system. The linked use case mentions net terms but does not provide concrete evidence of their implementation or tracking, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of net terms (Net-15/30/45) and due-date tracking being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
